name: repeat-15-i-to-claude
note: 15 context-qualified replacements of 'I' with 'Claude'. Edit #12's find is a PARAPHRASE of the document ('re-ran the gate' vs 're-ran typecheck + the 27 style tests') — the model misquoted, and the honest outcome is a skip notice for exactly that one edit while the other 14 apply. Repeated-substring disambiguation + hallucinated-quote honesty in one payload.
docMarkdown:
# Studio redesign — overnight decisions log (2026-07-12)

Judgment calls I made while you slept, per your "make reasonable calls, nothing fully blocking, revisions in the morning." Each is **revisable** — nothing one-way. Newest at the bottom of each section. Codex is building A→B→C; I'm architecting/reviewing.

## ⚠️ Needs your / Design's attention in the morning

1. **Q2 contrast — a real Design spec bug (not shipped-wrong, just flagged). Design confirmed the text colors meet the 4.5:1 contrast minimum on a plain card. But the Accept/Reject buttons show that text on top of a translucent color wash, and once the wash is added, two combinations fall just short: Paper Accept = 4.35:1 and Gruvbox Reject = 3.97:1 (the minimum is 4.5:1). What I did: kept Design's exact colors as specified, and wrote the contrast test to record these actual numbers rather than pretend they pass. Design needs to decide: lighten the wash, change the text color, or accept the current numbers. Everything else in Q2 looks good.**

2. **H3 heading size (Q10) — still open with Design. The design handoff doesn't specify an H3 size, but** [but the rail](https://www.cnn.com) has an H3 button. I set an **interim H3 = \~21px / weight 600** (between H2 26 and body 18), flagged in code. Added as Q10 to `QUESTIONS.md`. Design should confirm or give the real value.

## Decisions I made and am running with

- **Theme mechanism:** switched from the old `.theme-*` CSS class to the handoff's `[data-theme="paper|gruvbox"]` attribute (matches Design exactly). Persistence key `quill-theme` kept; values now `paper`/`gruvbox`. The four retired themes (sage/warm/cool/earth) are gone, per your decision.
- `package-lock.json`**:** reset to a clean base (you authorized) so Commit A's lockfile delta is *only* the font swap (Mulish/Lora out, Instrument Sans / Source Serif 4 / JetBrains Mono in).
- **Interim Q2 palette → real Design tokens:** I caught Codex mid-Phase-A before it locked the earlier hand-derived interim colors, and redirected it onto Design's exact Q2 hex from the addendum. Never shipped the interim.

## Coming in Phase C (from the addendum — decisions I'll make there, flagged for your review)

- **Q7 — Claude reply block changes (behavior change):** Design says drop **"Apply edit"** and **"View diff"**; the reply carries **"View suggestion"** (scrolls to the linked tracked-suggestion card, where Accept/Reject happens) + **"Dismiss"**. AI authorship uses a cool **slate** "AI" badge (distinct from the terracotta accent). I'll implement this as specified.
- `⌘/` **shortcut:** Design's empty-state copy says "press ⌘/ to ask Claude," but no such shortcut exists today. I'll either add a `⌘/` binding that opens the Ask-Claude flow, or adjust the copy to match reality — leaning toward adding the binding. Will note which I chose.

## Bundle status

- Working from `design_handoff_quill_studio 3` (README + `STUDIO_SPEC_ADDENDUM.md` + `prototype/` + `studio-spec-visual-reference.html` = the Turn-3 visual, offline). #3 = #2 + the visual file; no token/spec changes.

## Where things are

- Branch `integrate/studio-redesign` off `integrate/ui-polish` @ 5394f45. Phases: A (design system) → B (shell) → C (comments panel + suggestion cards). Full CI green at each commit.

## Progress

- **✅ Checkpoint A APPROVED** — Phase A committed `a693108` ("feat: establish Studio design system"). I cross-reviewed it independently: Design tokens verbatim, fonts bundled (no CDN), legacy aliases mapped correctly, contrast test honest, and I re-ran typecheck + the 27 style tests myself — all green. Cleanly scoped (no shell files touched).
- **✅ Checkpoint B APPROVED** — Phase B committed `609f50c` ("feat: build Studio shell"). Both-theme screenshots (`test-results/checkpoint-b-{paper,gruvbox}.png`) faithfully match the Studio shell — rail, 44px topbar (breadcrumb `Untitled` + dirty dot, Ask-Claude, Editing/Suggesting, Accept-All gated on suggestion count), 640px serif document, 320px comments panel with the "General comment — no selection" field, mono status bar. `<Toolbar>` is no longer rendered (now a shared primitives module for Rail + Topbar). I re-ran typecheck/eslint/prettier + full vitest (417/417) myself — all green; Codex's Playwright was 214/214.
- **✅ Phase C midpoint APPROVED** (C1 `7eae400` + C2 `a4d8422`). The suggestion-card family and anchored positioning engine are in and render beautifully in both themes — see `test-results/checkpoint-c-midpoint-{paper,gruvbox}.png`: a comment card and a **Replacement** card with the semantic stripe/badge, red-struck/green-added diff preview, split Accept/Reject foot, correct anchoring, and count-gated Accept-All/Reject-All. The Q3 collision math lives in a pure, unit-tested module (`commentPositioning.ts`, 6 tests). I re-verified: typecheck/eslint/prettier + **vitest 428/428**. Claude-edit safety confirmed intact.
- **✅ Phase C COMPLETE** — all five sub-commits landed and cross-reviewed: C3 `ca1314f` (anchored composer; a high-zoom card-height mis-clamp was caught and fixed), C4 `16e959a` (Claude reply → **View suggestion / Dismiss**, Apply-edit & View-diff removed, `↳ from comment` provenance, edits still land as accept/rejectable tracked suggestions — with an e2e guard proving it; a post-jump focus bug was caught and fixed), C5 `1397782` (empty states as a React overlay that can't pollute the doc, `⌘/` wired to Ask-Claude, and the unused Toolbar component removed). I verified all four final state captures in both themes (`test-results/phase-c-final-*.png`) and re-ran the gate myself: typecheck/eslint/prettier + **vitest 430/430** (Codex Playwright 217/217). Codex's final self-audit found no stray markers.

---

## ☀️ Bottom line for the morning

**The entire Studio redesign is built, green, and faithful to the spec** — on branch `integrate/studio-redesign`, stacked cleanly on `integrate/ui-polish`:

|  | Commit | What |
| --- | --- | --- |
| A | `a693108` | Design system — bundled fonts (no CDN), Paper+Gruvbox tokens verbatim, `data-theme`, 4 themes retired |
| B | `609f50c` | Studio shell — rail / topbar / 640px doc / 320px panel / mono status bar |
| C | `7eae400`→`1397782` | Suggestion cards, anchored panel, new-comment flow, Claude-reply changes, empty states |

Every commit is CI-green; I independently re-verified typecheck / eslint / prettier / vitest at each gate, and the shell + card + composer + reply + empty-state screenshots all match the design.

**Two things want your (or Design's) call** — both at the top of this doc: the **Q2 button contrast** spec bug and the **H3 size**. Neither blocks anything.

**To drive it yourself:** I did *not* auto-launch the app overnight (didn't want an unattended window or a checkout tangle while Codex was still working). Say the word and I'll `git checkout integrate/studio-redesign` and `npm run tauri dev` so you can click through it — \~30 seconds. Or review the four `test-results/phase-c-final-*.png` + the two `checkpoint-c-midpoint-*.png` captures first.

Codex is standing by for your review and whatever revisions you want.
